decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.9% and S&P 500 +1.1% — a broad-based tech and growth rally. Our cash balance of $477 sits just below the $500 new-buy threshold, so no new positions are initiated today even though 4 slots remain open. All six current positions are held; the portfolio's +31.6% gain reflects momentum working in our favor and there is no reason to disrupt it in a bullish tape.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged in a broad risk-on session today, with the NASDAQ jumping 1.9% as investors piled into growth and technology equities. Sentiment was lifted by continued AI infrastructure optimism and improving macro confidence, pushing semiconductor and large-cap tech names sharply higher. The S&P 500's +1.1% gain confirmed the rally had wide market participation rather than being a narrow mega-cap squeeze.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日強勢上揚，市場情緒全面轉向風險偏好，納斯達克指數領漲1.9%，科技與成長股獲資金積極追捧。人工智能基礎設施投資熱潮持續，加上總體經濟前景趨穩，推動半導體及大型科技股顯著走高。標普500指數同步上漲1.1%，反映此輪漲勢屬廣度行情，並非僅集中於少數龍頭股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty a portfolio suffers when uninvested cash sits idle while the market rises. Today's $477 cash balance — just $23 short of the $500 deployment threshold — means we are fully exposed to this effect on a +1.9% NASDAQ day. Keeping cash too low to buy but too high to ignore is a common tension in active management, and a reminder why position sizing and cash buffers require deliberate planning.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中閒置現金因未能及時部署，導致在市場上漲時錯失收益的績效損耗現象。今日我們的現金餘額僅477美元，距500美元的買入門檻僅差23美元，在納斯達克上漲1.9%的行情下，這筆現金實際上形成了一定的機會成本。這正提醒主動投資者：倉位規模與現金緩衝需事先謹慎規劃，避免陷入「買不夠、又用不上」的兩難困境。
